name: Iron Throne Indoor Golf Club
address: 430 E Lamar Blvd Ste 120, Arlington, TX 76011
about: Iron Throne Indoor Golf Club is an indoor golf facility located in Arlington, TX. It provides a modern space for golf simulation with a bar and food options. The venue offers league play, events, lessons, and a loyalty program. It features multiple bays for golf simulation and has a BYOB policy, allowing customers to bring their own food and drinks. The facility is equipped with advanced technology for an enhanced golfing experience.
why_golfers_like_it: BYOB and food policy allows for a personalized and cost-effective experience
Data-powered lessons provide insights to improve golf skills
Loyalty program offers 5% cash back on spending
Bi-weekly leagues provide regular competitive play opportunities

food_and_drink.notes: Customers are encouraged to bring their own food. 'BYOB & FOODPLAY MORE,SPEND LESS!'
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy is advertised on the website.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) and food policy, allowing customers to bring their own.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time for 18 holes. It is recommended to book online for specific time slots.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly mention child-friendly features, policies, or events. It is advisable to contact the venue directly for inquiries regarding children.
